description: Telecom domain Simple SOP rules. Each rule states a hard precondition/constraint that a single agent action must satisfy. 6 rules. Slot/action references must resolve against data/slots/telecom_slots.json and data/actions/telecom_actions.json. Used by T5 (SCD).

rules.name: Identity verification required
rules.description: No account-modifying action may execute before verify_identity has succeeded.
rules.constraint: verify_identity MUST appear earlier in the dialogue before any of applies_to_actions.

rules.name: Addon removal requires active addon
rules.description: remove_addon must not be invoked unless the named addon is currently active (addon_status='active').
rules.constraint: addon_status == 'active' for the target addon_name before remove_addon is allowed.

rules.name: Service resume requires suspended status
rules.description: resume_service must not be invoked unless service_status is currently 'suspended'.

rules.name: Device activation requires valid IMEI
rules.description: activate_device must carry a 15-digit IMEI and a non-empty device_model.
rules.constraint: imei matches /^\d{15}$/ and device_model is a non-empty string.

rules.name: Bill payment must be positive and bounded
rules.description: pay_bill amount must be > 0 and <= billing_amount.

rules.name: Billing cycle change requires existing payment method
rules.description: change_billing_cycle must not be invoked unless payment_method is already set on the account.
rules.constraint: payment_method is non-null before change_billing_cycle is allowed.
